summary: Added WARRANT records for self-model adjudication and PLAN admission. This corrected the earlier attempt to use context admission for a plan target: context admission remains for context-pack inclusion, while WARRANT records approve or reject self-model claims and governed actions. Added validate_warrant_record, scripts/write_warrant_record.py, WARR-20260705-0001 admitting PLAN-20260705-0001, and SELF_MODEL.json inclusion of warrants, warrant_counts, and admitted_plans. Fixed warrant_counts to count warrant_state rather than status. Focused self-model tests passed with 26 tests and the full suite passed with 295 tests before commit.
